text:
Tarsetol Station (, Tāsetoru-eki) is a train station in Yorknew City. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 126 

Overview

Tarsetol Station was used as an assembly point for Mr. Battera's new Greed Island recruits. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Tsezguerra instructs the new Greed Island players to assemble at Tarsetol Station. 

Trivia

Anime and Manga Differences

In the 2011 anime adaptation, the name of the station is not mentioned. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 60 (2011) 

References

 

fr:Tarsetol
